missions.title: Grandmother's Easy Phone
missions.description: Build an easy-to-use phone with large icons, long battery life, and low cost.

missions.title: Teen Gamer Phone
missions.description: Build a gaming phone with a fast CPU, 120Hz display, strong cooling, and large battery.

missions.title: Scientist's Research Phone
missions.description: Build the highest performance phone with many sensors and excellent GPS.

missions.title: Photographer's Phone
missions.description: Build a phone optimized for photography with AI processing and fast storage.

missions.title: Outdoor Explorer Phone
missions.description: Build a rugged phone with water resistance, barometer, and large battery.
